items.title: The Year Of The NarrVol
items.description: Looking ahead at the narratives set to emerge in 2026, two begin to surface when digging through the details - margins and "NarrVol" (narrative volatility).

items.title: One Of The Best Buying Setups I've Ever Seen Is Hiding In Plain Sight
items.description: While markets seem too richly priced to invest in right now, and bonds and cash are too inflation-exposed and/or interest rate sensitive. See more here.

items.title: All In And More
items.description: US job growth remained sluggish in November, and the unemployment rate rose to a four-year high of 4.6%, up 120 basis points (bps) from the April 2023 low of 3.4%.

items.title: The Fed Should Look At Private Sector Jobs Growth And Not Get Distracted By The Massive Federal Government Job Cuts
items.description: Federal government civilian headcount got slashed by 162,000 in October and by 172,000 over the three months of September, October, and November.

items.title: Employment Report: 64K Jobs Added In November Followed By October's 105K Loss
items.description: The latest employment report showed that 64,000 jobs were added in November, following the loss of 105,000 in October.
